component.name: MessageReceiver_renewLock
component.description: The operation renews lock on a message in a queue or subscription based on messageLockToken.

component.name: MessageReceiver_receive
component.description: Receive message from queue or subscription.

component.name: MessageReceiver_defer
component.description: Defer the message in a Queue or Subscription based on messageLockToken. It prevents the message from being

component.name: MessageReceiver_receivePayload
component.description: Receive message payload from queue or subscription.

component.name: MessageReceiver_abandon
component.description: Abandon message from queue or subscription based on messageLockToken. Abandon processing of the message for

component.name: MessageReceiver_receiveDeferred
component.description: Receives a deferred Message. Deferred messages can only be received by using sequence number and return

component.name: MessageReceiver_receiveBatch
component.description: Receive batch of messages from queue or subscription.

component.name: MessageReceiver_complete
component.description: Complete message from queue or subscription based on messageLockToken. Declares the message processing to be

component.name: MessageReceiver_deadLetter
component.description: Dead-Letter the message & moves the message to the Dead-Letter Queue based on messageLockToken. Transfer
